nodes.label: Tee Color Set in Manifest Not Filename
nodes.norm_label: tee color set in manifest not filename

nodes.label: Birdie Hunter
nodes.rationale: Black Tier challenge: Birdie or better.

nodes.label: Drain the Bomb
nodes.rationale: Black Tier challenge: Make a putt of 20+ feet.

nodes.label: Go For It
nodes.rationale: Black Tier challenge: Reach a par 5 in two.

nodes.label: Nuke It
nodes.rationale: Black Tier challenge: 250+ yard drive in the fairway.

nodes.label: Bogey Train
nodes.rationale: White Tee card. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: Bogey or better.

nodes.label: Cap the Damage
nodes.rationale: White Tee card. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: No double bogey or better.

nodes.label: Find It
nodes.rationale: White Tee card. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: No lost balls.

nodes.label: Greenlight
nodes.rationale: White Tee card. Subtitle: SHORT GRASS. Challenge: Green in regulation.

nodes.label: Lag It Close
nodes.rationale: White Tee card. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: Two-putt or better.

nodes.label: Make Par
nodes.rationale: White Tee card. Subtitle: AROUND THE GREENS. Challenge: Par or better.

nodes.label: No Snowman
nodes.rationale: White Tee card. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: Score less than 8.

nodes.label: No Three-Jacks
nodes.rationale: White Tee. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: No 3-putts.

nodes.label: Not the Goat
nodes.rationale: White Tee. Subtitle: VIBES. Challenge: Don't take the highest score in the group.

nodes.label: One and Done
nodes.rationale: White Tee. Subtitle: AROUND THE GREENS. Challenge: One-putt the hole.

nodes.label: Skip the Beach
nodes.rationale: White Tee. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: Stay out of the sand.

nodes.label: Split the Fairway
nodes.rationale: White Tee. Subtitle: SHORT GRASS. Challenge: Hit the fairway off the tee.

nodes.label: Stay Dry
nodes.rationale: White Tee. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: No water on this hole.

nodes.label: Tree-Free
nodes.rationale: White Tee. Subtitle: NO-DISASTER. Challenge: Stay out of the trees.

nodes.label: Closest to the Pin
nodes.rationale: Matchup card. CHALLENGE: Closest to pin in regulation.

nodes.label: Long Ball
nodes.rationale: Matchup card. CHALLENGE: Longest drive in the fairway.
